sources.title: The Message 2017 Official HD Trailer
sources.description: The Message 2017 Official HD Trailer by Moustapha Akkad

metadata.Plot: In the 7th century, Mohammed, Peace Be Upon Him, is visited by Angel Gabriel who urges him to lead the people of Mecca and worship God. But they're exiled in Medina before returning to Mecca to take up arms against their oppressors and liberate their city in the name of God (Allah).
metadata.Writer: H.A.L. Craig, Abdel Hamid Gouda El Sahhar, Tewfik El-Hakim
metadata.Actors: Anthony Quinn, Irene Papas, Michael Ansara
metadata.Country: Lebanon, Libya, Kuwait, Morocco, United Kingdom
